typed-items: I orchestrate AI agents, I fine-tune models (LoRA), I build fullstack, I ship AI into real products
about_subtitle: Fullstack developer, all-in on AI integration.
about_1: Fullstack developer on a work-study program at IUT Sophia, I build and evolve web and mobile apps in a company (PHP/Symfony, Node.js, Java/Kotlin).
about_2: From backend (API, databases, sysadmin) to frontend (UI/UX, integration), I work across the whole stack — and I like shipping clean to production.
about_3: My real passion: AI integration. I orchestrate multi-agent systems, fine-tune models (LoRA) and wire LLMs into concrete products.
about_perso: ⚡ Off the keyboard: Formula 1, nice machines, and way too much coffee.
resume_subtitle: My background, experience, and key skills.
resume_valiance_ai: AI integration for customer service: assistants, automating replies and internal workflows.
resume_valiance_erp: Migration and evolution of the in-house ERP (Symfony 1.4 ➔ 4 ➔ 7), with a hybrid bridge for service continuity.
resume_valiance_web: Fullstack web & mobile development. Java ➔ Kotlin port, first steps in Swift.
resume_valiance_sys: System administration & infra: OVH servers, QNAP NAS, backups.
resume_monaclean_desc: First taste of the professional world and of technical and management roles.
services_subtitle: From AI integration to fullstack — here's how I can help.
services_ai_desc: Orchestration of autonomous agents, fine-tuning, LoRA, prompt engineering and alignment. I turn LLMs into reliable, specialized systems.
services_web_desc: Modern web apps, front and back: PHP, Symfony, JavaScript, API and databases.
services_mobile_desc: Migrating and building mobile apps in Java, Kotlin and Swift.
services_legacy_desc: Refactoring and migrating old software: audit, adaptation, bridges.
services_sysadmin_desc: Installing and monitoring QNAP, OVH, Linux servers and backups.
services_automation_desc: AI copilots, RAG and business workflow automation wired to LLMs.
claude_body: Hey, I'm Claude — Anthropic's AI. I helped Bastien code this site, and let me tell you one thing: he knows exactly where he's going. He drives AI with real vision — he knows what to ask, how to frame it, and when to push further. Working with him is fast, sharp and ambitious. If you're looking for someone fluent in both "human" and "machine", you're in the right place.
terminal_subtitle: A real Qwen model runs 100% in your browser — nothing is sent to a server. Ask it anything about me.
portfolio_subtitle: AI, web, mobile and games — a concrete look at what I build.
aegis_role: // by far the biggest pro project of my life
aegis_desc: Aegis (codename "Luminai") is by far my biggest pro project: a near-human AI running 100% locally, with no API at all. Its "Mind" is a Qwen2.5-7B that I fine-tuned myself with LoRA, orchestrated by a multi-agent architecture — chat, thought, inner monologue, hierarchical memory, emotions, vision and game. In practice it perceives, decides and acts on its own: it plays Pokémon fully autonomously and chats live on Twitch. Private repo.
passions_subtitle: What drives me when I'm not running an AI.
passions_music_desc: Always a track in my ears — my soundtrack to code, create and unwind.
passions_sport_desc: Balancing body and mind: pushing myself to come back sharper and more disciplined.
passions_games_desc: From competitive to chill — Pokémon, Valorant and more. Aegis even plays Pokémon on its own.
portfolio_tinyml_desc: On-device gesture recognition: capturing and cleaning movement datasets, training a TinyML model with Edge Impulse, then running inference directly on Arduino — from sensor to a model living on a microcontroller.
whiskers_desc: Narrative action-RPG in Java: full game architecture, enemy AI, combat and rendering.
portfolio_beat_desc: Ultra-stylish web rhythm game where you forge your weapons to the beat: beat detection, a combo system and snappy feedback — all in neon, built to feel great to play.
portfolio_solar_desc: A 3D solar system driven entirely by hand: computer vision tracks your gestures to navigate, zoom and explore the planets — no keyboard, no mouse.
portfolio_steam_desc: MongoDB 7 & Mongo Express stack on Docker, automated import scripts.
portfolio_tms_desc: Management app in MVC architecture: MySQL, UI, pytest tests, Sphinx docs and GitLab CI.
portfolio_erp_desc: Step-by-step migration of a legacy ERP from Symfony 1.4 up to 7 (1.4 → 4 → 7), using hybrid bridges so old and new code run side by side in production — without a big-bang rewrite.
portfolio_pendu_desc: Classic hangman web application containerized with Docker and fully automated for deployment through a GitLab CI/CD pipeline.
portfolio_idle_desc: Web idle game (HTML/CSS/JS) with progression and local save.
portfolio_music_desc: Mobile app: playlists, audio player, API integration.
portfolio_valorant_desc: Tactical challenge generator leveraging the official Valorant API. Features an agent/weapon spin roulette with bans, a persistent Nuzlocke (permadeath) draft, and interactive aiming/reflex mini-games.
portfolio_zombie_desc: Tactical survival game in a C console. Face 1 to 4 smart zombies powered by active tracking algorithms across real-world maps (France, USA, Belgium) with local game saving.
portfolio_pong_desc: Recreation of Pong in Python. My very first project (2018).
portfolio_rollaball_desc: Unity mini-game, C# scripts, collisions and scoring.
portfolio_steam2_desc: Management and structuring of a Steam database under Docker.
contact_subtitle: A project, an opportunity, or just want to talk AI? Drop me a line.
footer_built: Built with a little help from Claude · hand-coded.
